title: Heavy Duty Grill, BBQ Barbeque and Oven Cleaner ¦ Great for Removing Burnt on Grease, Food and Carbon Deposits ¦ Ready to use Formula 5L
features: GRILL CLEANER - Having had an enjoyable meal don't take on the huge task of scrubbing and cleaning your oven or BBQ set. Use PowerChem Oven & BBQ cleaner for great effortless results in minimum time. Super-strength cleaner - Cleans your grill and is safe on food-prep surfaces
REMOVES GREASE & CARBON DEPOSITS - PowerChem BBQ cleaner is second to none. Simply spray, wait a few minutes and wipe. Quickly cleans grime and removes grease effortlessly from your grill and grates

HOW TO USE - Spray generously, leave for a few minutes and wipe with warm damp cloth. Some stubborn areas may require another treatment. Finally, rinse well with fresh water. For most effective results spray affected areas whilst the surface is warm to touch. Great for removing stains, burnt-on food, baked-on deposits, carbon, grease and discolouration from stainless steel hobs and grills
BIODEGRADABLE - Super-strength liquid is biodegradable and reduces smoke/flare-ups
SAFE TO USE - Suitable for most surfaces, Ovens, BBQ's, Grills, Cooking Grates/Racks, Pans & Grill interiors/exteriors
description: Product description The only thing people hate about Barbecuing is the cleaning afterwards. Such a chore having to clean the grills, and surfaces....a time consuming task. Well now everyone has a solution. No longer is it a time consuming task when you use the PowerChem BBQ and Oven Cleaner. Spray, wait and wipe. It removes grease deposits and burnt on food effortlessly. A must for every BBQ enthusiast. HOW TO USE - Spray generously, leave for a few minutes and wipe with warm damp cloth. Some stubborn areas may require another treatment. Finally, rinse well with fresh water. For most effective results spray affected areas whilst the surface is warm to touch. Great for removing stains, burnt-on food, baked-on deposits, carbon, grease and discolouration from stainless steel hobs and grills Has a powerful trigger that is perfect for use on both the inside and outside of your grill, smoker, or deep fryer. Manufactured in the UK Safety Warning Keep away from children and Animals
